title: Minimal Genome
script_summary: Exploring the concept of minimal genome without sensationalism, highlighting its scientific basis and uncertainty.

segments.voiceover: What if we could reduce life to its simplest form?
The minimal genome is a living blueprint, stripped of excess.
Researchers have identified essential genes, but it isn’t straightforward.
Each organism has unique needs, making minimalism complex.
The journey reveals not just simplicity but the essence of life itself.
Curious about how this impacts biology? Follow for more insights!
